title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Lenovo India Capital India in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
